perks.summary: inspect a Neuropixels recording (streams, channels, duration, bad channels, signal stats) — read-only
bandpass-filter, phase-shift, detect/remove bad channels, common-median-reference, and save a preprocessed recording
run a spike sorter (kilosort4 / spykingcircus2 / mountainsort5 / ...) on a preprocessed recording
build a SortingAnalyzer, compute quality metrics, and apply threshold-based curation (allen/ibl/strict)
export a SortingAnalyzer to Phy format for manual curation
end-to-end pipeline: load -> preprocess -> drift check -> motion correction -> sort -> postprocess -> curate -> export
